creator: ru@ucb.crimea.ua
text:
The current port for www/lynx refers to the Lynx v2.7.2,
	which is not available from

		http://sol.slcc.edu/lynx/release/

Fix: 

Either update MASTER_SITES to match the new location

		http://sol.slcc.edu/lynx/release-2.7.2/

	or (better yet) update port to the new release 2.8.
How-To-Repeat: 
	Try to build a package
